visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Inside a brightly lit Costco warehouse, a young woman with a black beret and dark off-the-shoulder top stands before a shelf of tall Fiddle Leaf Fig plants. She smiles warmly at the camera, gesturing towards the lush green leaves. Large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' text is superimposed over the industrial ceiling background. (2) The camera zooms in on a white price tag attached to the plant rack. It lists 'FIDDLE LEAF FIG' and a price of '$899'. A hand with pale skin enters the frame, pointing directly at the price. The vibrant green leaves of the plant frame the tag in a close-up shot. (3) Back to a medium shot of the woman standing beside the potted plants. She continues her animated presentation, using wide hand gestures. In the background, other customers and warehouse shelves stacked with bulky boxes are visible under the cool, overhead fluorescent lighting. (4) A close-up view of the care instructions on the plant's tag shows three blue bullet points detailing watering and sunlight needs. A finger points at each instruction. The woman's sheer sleeve is partially visible as she holds the tag steady for the camera. (5) The woman stands back and continues talking expressively, smiling and waving her hands to emphasize the value. Other shoppers are blurred in the distant background, and a metal shopping cart is partially visible to her left.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Subtitle]: 身為一個森林系. (3) [Slogan]: 只要899元. 誇張比Ikea便宜. 琴葉榕八吋盆栽. (4) [Subtitle]: 琴葉榕 非常的 好看. 他還給你 一個 花盆. (5) [Subtitle]: 他八吋 你知道這高度 110-140公分. 所以放家裡或店面很好看. (6) [Variety]: 好市多真的很划算. [Slogan]: 花盆還便宜. (7) [Subtitle]: 三天澆一次水. 半日照 葉面灑水. 兩到三個月 平均施肥一次. (8) [Variety]: 你叫我搬.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 hand of a cameraman, and at least 2 other shoppers sitting or walking in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret, an off-the-shoulder dark grey top with sheer mesh sleeves, and light blue ripped denim jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The plant section of a Costco warehouse, featuring metal industrial shelving, bulk merchandise on pallets, other shoppers, and several tall Fiddle Leaf Fig plants in white pots.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The track opens with a mid-tempo acoustic guitar melody, providing a warm and friendly background. A female voice with a clear, resonant timbre begins speaking at a fast, energetic pace. The ambient floor is a low-level warehouse hum characteristic of a large indoor space. (2) A brief, percussive pop sound effect marks a transition. The female speaker’s pitch fluctuates dynamically as she engages in a lighthearted dialogue with an off-camera male voice. His voice is deeper, with a casual and humorous inflection. (3) The female speaker’s vocal arousal increases, evidenced by a higher pitch while discussing the price. The spectral brightness of the recording is centered in the mid-frequencies, typical of a smartphone field recording. The guitar BGM maintains a steady rhythmic pulse underneath. (4) The dialogue continues with a series of quick verbal exchanges. The male voice’s tone is teasing, causing the female speaker to laugh. The BGM remains consistent in volume, balanced well below the primary speech signal. The speaker delivers a final enthusiastic phrase as the music resolves.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Evidence -> Price Comparison -> Practical Care Info
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a high-value shopping find at Costco, specifically a Fiddle Leaf Fig plant. The creator highlights the low price compared to competitors like IKEA and provides basic care tips to encourage viewers to purchase it for home decoration.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video appears to be a personal vlog discovery rather than a paid advertisement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Typical social-native short-form vlog style using high-contrast text and playful banter to present retail value information.
